The '''Farrimmer Cafe''' was a bar and grill aboard the [[Mynock 7 Space Station]]. It was owned by the [[Filvian]] [[H'nib Statermast]] and his [[Vaathkree (species)|Vaathkree]] partner, [[Grosteek]], during the reign of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The smoky, dim interior was in stark contrast to the vibrant exterior, with its images of menu items. [[M-3PO (Treedee)|Treedee]] greeted visitors to the Farrimmer Cafe, while [[A5]] served as a bouncer.

It was here that [[Bnugor]] briefly lost his pet [[snuzzleguff]], [[Snowball (object)|Snowball]].
